missing_sub_functions: Successful Registration Flow (including email dispatch verification)
recommendations: Add a sub-function under User Account Registration to cover successful registration validation: positive case with all valid fields, and verification that an email is sent to the user.
Consider adding a test category for first name and last name validation (if any length or character restrictions may exist, even if not specified, to ensure reasonable handling).

Enhance the password test categories to include edge cases for allowed special characters (based on assumption) and verify rejection of potentially disallowed characters if a blacklist is later defined.
Add a test category under Email Verification to confirm that after successful registration, the system sends a verification email with a valid token.
